name: make_accessible
title: Make Accessible
desc: Official default remediation preset for automated PDF/UA-1 compliance using PDFix SDK. The preset performs conservative, non-destructive cleanup, structure repair, tagging completion, and accessibility fixes.

actions.name: delete_annot
actions.title: Delete Annotations (TrapNet, PrinterMark)
actions.desc: Remove non-permitted annotation types that commonly cause PDF/UA compliance failures. TrapNet and PrinterMark annotations are production artifacts and must not be present in accessible documents.

actions.name: fix_parent_tree
actions.title: Fix Parent Tree (Initial repair)
actions.desc: Rebuild and normalize the ParentTree to ensure that all marked content references (MCIDs) correctly point to the structure tree. This establishes a stable structural foundation before tagging and cleanup.

actions.name: add_tags
actions.title: AutoTag (Preflight, Preserve Existing Tags)
actions.desc: Automatically add missing structure tags using preflight-assisted layout analysis while preserving any existing tag structure. The action does not overwrite tags and does not inject standard layout attributes, keeping remediation conservative and predictable.

actions.name: fix_table_tag
actions.title: Fix Table Tag
actions.desc: Repair standard Table tag structure without flattening. Normalize cell span attributes (RowSpan/ColSpan) for consistent column counts across rows, generate missing header cells when needed, and move invalid nested elements outside the Table to keep the structure PDF/UA-friendly.

actions.name: fix_table_tag
actions.desc: Flatten incorrectly structured tables to a simpler, more robust hierarchy. Use this mode when table sections or internal nesting are malformed; it converts the table structure to reduce complexity and moves invalid nested elements outside the Table to prevent PDF/UA table validation failures.
actions.title: Fix Table Tag

actions.name: delete_tags
actions.title: Delete Tags (Empty non-semantic tags)
actions.desc: Remove empty structure elements that do not carry semantic meaning and only pollute the tag tree. Headings, table cells, table rows, and list bodies are explicitly preserved to avoid breaking document semantics.

actions.name: delete_tags
actions.title: Delete Tags (Whitespace-only content)
actions.desc: Remove structure elements whose content consists only of whitespace. The associated content is converted to artifacts to prevent screen readers from announcing meaningless text.

actions.name: remove_content_marks
actions.title: Remove Content Marks (Invalid MCIDs)
actions.desc: Remove marked-content sequences that reference invalid or broken MCIDs. This prevents structure corruption and resolves common ParentTree and content reference errors.

actions.name: artifact_content
actions.title: Artifact Untagged Content
actions.desc: Mark untagged page content without MCIDs as artifacts. This ensures that decorative or non-semantic content is ignored by assistive technologies.

actions.name: set_display_doc_title
actions.title: Fix Display Document Title
actions.desc: Synchronize the ViewerPreferences DisplayDocTitle setting with the actual document title so that assistive technologies announce the correct title.

actions.name: embed_font
actions.title: Embed Fonts
actions.desc: Embed all fonts used in the document to ensure consistent rendering and reliable text extraction across platforms and assistive technologies.

actions.name: fix_headings
actions.title: Fix Headings (Add missing headings)
actions.desc: Normalize heading hierarchy by resolving skipped levels and converting headings to a consistent generic H* structure. This improves outline quality and screen reader navigation.

actions.name: fix_parent_tree
actions.title: Fix Parent Tree (Final normalization)
actions.desc: Re-run ParentTree repair after tagging and cleanup to ensure all newly created or modified content references are correctly linked.

actions.name: fix_oc_name
actions.title: Fix Optional Content Configuration
actions.desc: Repair Optional Content (OCG) configuration dictionaries to ensure layer definitions are valid and accessible.

actions.name: set_suspect_value
actions.title: Clear Suspect Flag
actions.desc: Fix the MarkInfo dictionary by clearing the Suspects entry, indicating that the document structure is no longer considered unreliable.

actions.name: fix_structure_spaces
actions.title: Fix Structure Spaces (Add missing, Artifact unnecessary)
actions.desc: Insert missing spaces between words and mark unnecessary spaces as artifacts to improve text readability for screen readers.

actions.name: tag_annot
actions.title: Tag Untagged Annotations
actions.desc: Attach untagged annotations to the nearest appropriate structure elements so that interactive content is included in the document structure.

actions.name: set_annot_contents
actions.title: Set Annotation Contents (BBox text)
actions.desc: Populate annotation Contents using text extracted from the annotation bounding box. Provides meaningful accessible names when available.

actions.name: set_annot_contents
actions.title: Set Annotation Contents (Action destination)
actions.desc: Populate annotation Contents using the annotation action destination (e.g., link target) when available.

actions.name: set_annot_contents
actions.title: Set Annotation Contents (Auto-generated)
actions.desc: Populate annotation Contents using auto-generated text as a fallback when no meaningful source text is available.

actions.name: set_alt
actions.title: Set Alt (Figure/Formula: From associated content)
actions.desc: Set alternate descriptions for Figure and Formula tags using associated tag content. If an Annotation is present among children, its Contents is used.

actions.name: set_alt
actions.title: Set Alt (Figure/Formula: First description tag above)
actions.desc: Set alternate descriptions for Figure and Formula tags using the first suitable description tag found above the element.

actions.name: set_alt
actions.title: Set Alt (Figure/Formula: First description tag below)
actions.desc: Set alternate descriptions for Figure and Formula tags using the first suitable description tag found below the element.

actions.name: set_alt
actions.title: Set Alt (Figure/Formula: Custom text fallback)
actions.desc: Set alternate descriptions for Figure and Formula tags using a custom fallback value when no meaningful description is available.

actions.name: set_alt
actions.title: Set Alt (Form: From associated content)
actions.desc: Set alternate descriptions for Form tags using associated tag content. If an Annotation is present among children, its Contents is used.

actions.name: fix_media_clip_keys
actions.title: Fix Media Clip (Content-Type to text/plain)
actions.desc: Fix media clip content type keys to a safe default (text/plain) to prevent validation failures on embedded media metadata.

actions.name: set_tag_id
actions.title: Set Tag IDs (Note, TH)
actions.desc: Generate unique ID keys for Note and table header (TH) structure elements as required by PDF/UA.

actions.name: set_tabs_key
actions.title: Set Tab Order (Structure)
actions.desc: Set the page Tabs key to Structure so keyboard navigation follows the logical reading order.

actions.name: fix_metadata
actions.desc: Repair and normalize document XMP metadata to improve standards compliance and consistency
actions.title: Fix XMP Metadata

actions.name: set_title
actions.desc: Set the document Title metadata by picking text from the first matching structure tag (H1). This aligns metadata with the visible main heading for assistive technologies and preserves any existing Title unless overwrite is enabled.
actions.title: Set Title (From H1 Heading)

actions.name: set_title
actions.desc: Set the document Title metadata from the PDF Info dictionary. Use this as a reliable fallback when the tag structure does not contain a suitable heading. Existing Title is preserved unless overwrite is enabled.
actions.title: Set Title (From Info Dictionary)

actions.name: set_title
actions.desc: Set the document Title metadata from the input file name. This provides a deterministic fallback title when neither tag-based detection nor existing Info metadata is suitable. Existing Title is preserved unless overwrite is enabled.
actions.title: Set Title (From File Name)

actions.name: set_pdf_ua_standard
actions.title: Set PDF/UA-1 Identifier
actions.desc: Declare PDF/UA-1 conformance by setting the appropriate PDF/UA identifier in the document metadata.

actions.name: set_language
actions.title: Set Document Language (en-US)
actions.desc: Define the primary document language to ensure correct pronunciation and processing by assistive technologies.

actions.name: create_bookmarks
actions.title: Create Bookmarks
actions.desc: Create bookmarks for the document to improve navigation and accessibility.
